summary: Full backend (25 pytest tests) and frontend (Playwright) testing of Oásis Rio passed. All listed features in the review request work: massagistas seeding/list/filter/geo-sort/detail, bookings (auth, validation, amount from server-side pricing), Stripe checkout session creation + idempotent status polling, Emergent Google auth via Bearer token, and full Home → Detail → Booking dialog → Pay flow including MyBookings list.

minor.issue: Only reads cookie session_token, not Authorization Bearer header. Bearer-based clients (the React app uses oasis_token in localStorage) cannot invalidate their session via this endpoint. Logout still works via cookie path. Recommend supporting Bearer token in logout symmetric with login/me/bookings.

issues: Decorative hero text shadow (text-shadow-lg) is a custom utility — verify it is defined in tailwind.config; if missing it silently does nothing

action_items: (Optional) Make POST /api/auth/logout also accept Authorization: Bearer <token> to allow Bearer-based clients to invalidate their server session
critical_code_review_comments: server.py haversine + seed flow is clean; jitter for duplicate bairros is fine.
All Mongo reads use projection {_id: 0} — ObjectID never leaks. Good.
Amount for Stripe checkout is taken from DB booking (not request payload). Good — prevents tampering.
checkout_status correctly guards against re-toggling already-confirmed bookings (idempotent).

Pydantic models do not constrain duration to {60,90,120} or location_type to enum — relies on manual checks inside the handler. Would be cleaner to use Literal[60,90,120] and Literal['studio','home'].

CORS uses allow_origin_regex='.*' with allow_credentials=True — known browser quirk: cookies cross-origin can be blocked by ingress overriding ACAO to '*'. The Bearer token fallback in get_current_user is the right workaround (already implemented).
test_credentials: Bearer token minted directly in MongoDB user_sessions (see /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Test session active during this run: token=test_token_1781312661253_njiski user_id=user_qa_w6dkfozf.
seed_data_creation: Inserted 1 QA user + session token directly into MongoDB for protected endpoint testing. Cleaned up automatically via pytest fixture teardown for the main scoped user. Manual session (test_token_1781312661253_njiski) still present for browser test reproduction.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://stupefied-gauss-5.preview.emergentagent.com. Pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_oasis_rio.py covers all critical endpoints (health, bairros, massagistas CRUD-ish + filters, auth/me, bookings CRUD + validation, checkout session + status idempotency, logout). For UI tests inject Bearer token via add_init_script -> localStorage.setItem('oasis_token', <token>) BEFORE navigation so AuthContext picks it up. Route-block https://checkout.stripe.com/** to prevent navigation away during pay-button test. Frontend env URL in /app/frontend/.env differs from problem statement — use the .env value.
rca of the issue: No bugs requiring RCA. The only minor finding (logout not accepting Bearer) is a small design symmetry issue, not a functional bug — the React app still works because cookie session is also created on login.
